use_codes.desc: AS-NEEDED TREATMENT OR PREVENTION OF BRONCHOCONSTRICTION AND REDUCTION OF THE RISK OF EXACERBATIONS IN PATIENTS WITH ASTHMA 18 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
AIRSUPRA is indicated for the as-needed treatment or prevention of bronchoconstriction and to reduce
the risk of exacerbations in patients with asthma 18 years of age and older.
